$comment: Reference case for fresnel_schlick (R = F0 + (1-F0)*(1-cosTheta)^5). Simple single-input, single-coefficient polynomial — a good regression target because LM should converge fast and exactly on a smooth 5th-power curve.
notes: F0=0.02 is water at n=1.33. Coefficient tolerance of 0.002 is 10 % of the canonical value — the fitter should do much better than that, so a breach indicates a real regression.
